pairs.note: APS delegation → AP2 OpenCheckoutMandate (intent / open). Round-trips back via ap2MandateToApsDelegation.
APS delegation + cart → AP2 CheckoutMandate (closed). One-way: cart contents not in APS delegation, so reverse trip loses items + total.
APS delegation + transaction-specific amount → AP2 PaymentMandate (closed). Reverse trip carries amount + payee + instrument back into delegation.scope.constraints.

notes.signing: APS Ed25519 over RFC 8785 JCS of the mandate dict. The cross-impl APS audit path. Wire-level SD-JWT/JWS encoding lives in the gateway integration layer.
notes.cnf_encoding: AP2 cnf.jwk encodes the APS delegatee pubkey as OKP/Ed25519 with x = base64url(pubkey_bytes).
notes.iat_exp: Unix epoch seconds derived from policy_context.valid_from / valid_until.
